title: Attention item (one attention state for the whole lab)
description: Created by attention rules over emissions; mutated ONLY via attention.ack/snooze/resolve (any channel — UI click, agent acting on a chat reply, auto-cleanup). Every mutation emits, so all channels see one truth. Incident collapse and flap damping live here, not in renderers. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields. CREATION RULES (complete set, server-side): crashed/lockout heartbeats; p0 bus signals; blocker task-cards (requires_reply from agents); review-ready task transitions; requested-artifact completion; card.dead dead-letters; security_critical_count>0 update rows; delivery.failed; build-failed feed items (fix_ops = task.dispatch with pre-bound retry args). attention.resolve is IDEMPOTENT on id.

grade.description: Severity-first ordering: p0/cracks, then blockers (agent questions), then review-ready, then requested artifacts.

source.description: Originating rule/signal: heartbeat | bus:<type> | tracker | delivery | ...

subject.description: Entity key (agent handle, host, service, task id).

summary.description: Fact-first reason line (danger-grade copy carries no un-glossed lore).

scope.description: ReBAC scope tag; whose attention this is.

incident_key.description: source+subject+rolling-window collapse key; items sharing it render as one incident with children. Flap damping: stays open until quiet for the damping interval.

fix_ops.description: Ops rendered as the inline ActionRow, WITH their args pre-bound server-side (no client-side derivation from subject).

acked_by.description: Principal id that claimed it; acked items dim + sort below new.

blast_radius.description: Server-joined blast radius for host/service items (the named §8 derivation, pre-joined like fix_ops).
